properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every promise we can make, Every prayer and step of faith, Every difference we will make Is only by His grace.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Every mountain we will climb, Every ray of hope we shine, Every blessing left behind Is only by His grace.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Grace alone which God supplies, strength unknown He will provide, Christ in us, our Cornerstone, we will go forth in grace alone.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Every soul we long to reach, Every heart we hope to teach, Everywhere we share His peace Is only by His grace.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Every loving word we say, Every tear we wipe away, Every sorrow turned to praise Is only by His grace.
